vendor_nda_2026.docx.summary: Third-party vendor NDA proposed by Acme Retail Group for evaluation of CloudServe analytics integration. Contains marked-materials-only confidentiality definition and uncapped indemnification — flagged as HIGH overall contract risk.
vendor_nda_2026.docx.snippet: Recipient shall hold in confidence only information that is specifically marked 'Confidential' at the time of disclosure... Recipient shall indemnify and hold harmless the Disclosing Party against any and all losses arising from unauthorized disclosure, without limitation of liability.

indicators: Commercial NDA draft — no attorney-client privilege expected, but contains pricing schedules and unreleased product roadmap
Third-party vendor terms referenced in Exhibit B with volume discount tiers
Marked 'Draft — For Discussion Purposes Only' — not yet executed

saas_msa_draft.docx.summary: CloudServe Inc. proposed MSA for enterprise analytics platform. One-sided client indemnification, three-month liability cap, and provider-only termination for convenience. Missing SLA exhibit and audit rights.
saas_msa_draft.docx.snippet: Client shall indemnify Provider against all third-party claims arising from Client's use of the Services, including data uploaded by Client, without cap or exclusion. Provider's total liability shall not exceed fees paid in the three (3) months preceding the claim.

indicators: Commercial terms under active negotiation — business counsel review in progress
Service level metrics referenced but not attached (Exhibit C missing)
No litigation strategy or privileged legal analysis detected

dpa_addendum_eu.pdf.summary: Standard GDPR Article 28 processor addendum with subprocessor list, SCCs, and 72-hour breach notification. Attached to TechVendor MSA for EU employee data processing.
dpa_addendum_eu.pdf.snippet: Processor shall implement appropriate technical and organisational measures to ensure a level of security appropriate to the risk, including pseudonymisation and encryption of personal data.

indicators: Standard GDPR processor terms — regulatory template, not litigation-related
Subprocessor list attachment (Annex III) with AWS, Snowflake entries
No client-identifying litigation facts or attorney work product

hipaa_baa_template.docx.summary: Template BAA for TechVendor Inc. covering PHI processing under covered entity's group health plan. Includes administrative safeguards checklist and breach notification procedures per 45 C.F.R. § 164.410.
hipaa_baa_template.docx.snippet: Business Associate shall implement administrative, physical, and technical safeguards that reasonably and appropriately protect the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of electronic protected health information.

indicators: HIPAA business associate template — compliance document, not privileged
Administrative safeguards checklist in Appendix A
No PHI samples or patient identifiers included

litigation_memo.docx.document_type: Attorney Work Product — Litigation Strategy Memo
litigation_memo.docx.summary: Privileged memo from outside counsel analyzing breach-of-contract claims against Delta Ventures. Contains settlement range ($1.2M–$1.8M), witness credibility assessments, and impeachment strategy for CFO deposition.
litigation_memo.docx.snippet: PRIVILEGED AND CONFIDENTIAL — ATTORNEY WORK PRODUCT. Preliminary settlement range: $1.2M–$1.8M based on comparable Cal.App. delivery-timing cases. CFO deposition outline attached — focus on Q3 earnings call statements contradicting written delivery timeline.

indicators: Attorney-client communication — header marked Privileged and Confidential
Work product — litigation strategy, settlement valuation, and witness preparation
Settlement range analysis and impeachment outline for key fact witness
Mental impressions and legal conclusions of counsel throughout

client_strategy.pdf.summary: Board-facing strategy document prepared by litigation counsel for Northstar Capital. Timeline of anticipated motions, budget projections, and privileged analysis of earnout dispute fiduciary duty exposure.
client_strategy.pdf.snippet: Board should authorize mediation before Q4 earnings. Fiduciary duty exposure under Northstar v. Delta framework if synergy disclosures are incomplete. Estimated defense budget: $850K through summary judgment phase.

indicators: Attorney-client communication prepared at direction of General Counsel
Board litigation strategy timeline with privileged legal recommendations
Witness preparation notes and document retention hold instructions
Client-identifying confidential facts regarding pending acquisition dispute

deposition_notes.docx.summary: Attorney notes for upcoming deposition of TechVendor project manager in Smith v. ABC Corp. Contains impeachment points, document binders, and counsel's mental impressions about witness credibility.
deposition_notes.docx.snippet: Deposition of J. Martinez (PM) — 3/15/2026. Key impeachment: Ex. 12 email ('we can slip the date') vs. trial testimony re time-is-essence. Counsel impression: witness cooperative but may defer to VP on contract interpretation.

indicators: Work product — deposition outline with impeachment strategy
Attorney mental impressions regarding witness demeanor and credibility
Cross-reference to privileged trial exhibits not yet produced

advisor_agreement_v3.docx.summary: Draft advisory board agreement for former executive — equity grant schedule, monthly retainer, and IP assignment provisions. Mapped to employment severance analysis for restrictive covenant review.
advisor_agreement_v3.docx.snippet: Advisor shall assign to Company all inventions conceived during the Advisory Term relating to Company's business. Monthly retainer: $8,000. Equity grant: 15,000 RSUs vesting over 24 months.

indicators: Advisory board compensation and equity terms — commercial, not privileged
IP assignment clause overlaps with employment severance analysis
No explicit attorney-client marking; prepared by HR with business counsel input

fail_me.docx.summary: Encrypted document container — content cannot be assessed. Simulated parse failure for queue demo.

indicators: Encrypted container — cannot assess privilege or contract content
